source_policy: Each entry cross-referenced against ≥2 of: JLPTSensei (jlpt_sensei), BunPro (bunpro_nX), Genki I/II (genki_LN), Tobira (tobira_LN). Disagreements resolved conservatively (lower JLPT = harder = wait longer).

entries.title: ありません — does not exist
〜ませんでした — polite past negative
〜てもいい — may / it's ok to
どちらが〜 — which is more 〜
Aのほうが Bより〜 — A is more 〜 than B
〜なければならない — must do
〜なくてもいい — don't have to
〜なら — if it's the case that
〜てある — result state (deliberate)
entries.short: te-form + ある: result of deliberate action

entries.title: 〜てくれる — someone does for me
〜てもらう — have someone do for me
〜によって — by means of / depending on
〜のではないか — isn't it that…?
お〜になる — honorific verb form
〜ところだ — about to / just did
〜として — as / in the role of
〜わけではない — it's not that…
〜ように — in such a way / like
〜ようにする — make a point of
〜ざるを得ない — have no choice but to
けれども — but / however (polite)
entries.short: polite contrast connector; sentence-initial or clause-final

entries.title: それで — and so / therefore
entries.short: consequence connector linking back to a stated reason
